prose: Fukui reactivity indices for aniline (14 atoms: N, C×6, H×7) computed at DFT tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-center integrals (no density fitting). Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, doublet), anion (charge −1, doublet). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, not re-optimized. All SCF states converged; integrity trustworthy=true. Headline value reported is f⁻ (nucleophilicity) at atom 1 (N) = 0.20452359 — the most nucleophilic site. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (ortho-C), f⁺ = 2.29759. No engine warnings. Charge conservation: sum(f⁺)=1.0000, sum(f⁻)=1.0000. Output: aniline_fukui_dft.json. CLI: cli.py fukui aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
